title: koeleria cristata var. elegantula
intro: Koeleria cristata var. elegantula, also known as elegant Koeleria or fine hair grass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. elegantula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
